description: Default no-op restart-block callback. Assigned to restart_block.fn so that __do_sys_restart_syscall calls it via restart->fn(restart). Tests detection of fn-ptr-via-struct-field where the registrar is a plain assignment (not a registration call).

calls_in_runtime.runtime_trigger: any task whose restart_block.fn was set to do_no_restart_syscall

registrations_in.notes: find every assignment of the form `<expr>.fn = do_no_restart_syscall` or `<ptr>->fn = do_no_restart_syscall` across the kernel

contract.notes: Hardest case: fn-ptr assigned to a struct field at file scope OR inside a function body, then later invoked via the field. Backend currently has no general mechanism for this.
